'''vovangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keely|keely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keely|keely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vovangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovangithi|vovangithi]] || [[word:vovangiji|vovangiji]] || [[word:vovangishi|vovangishi]] || [[word:vovangiki|vovangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovanguthuthu|vovanguthuthu]] || [[word:vovangujuju|vovangujuju]] || [[word:vovangushushu|vovangushushu]] || [[word:vovangukuku|vovangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovanguthu|vovanguthu]] || [[word:vovanguju|vovanguju]] || [[word:vovangushu|vovangushu]] || [[word:vovanguku|vovanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovangufthuf|vovangufthuf]] || [[word:vovangufjuf|vovangufjuf]] || [[word:vovangufshuf|vovangufshuf]] || [[word:vovangufkuf|vovangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovangethe|vovangethe]] || [[word:vovangeje|vovangeje]] || [[word:vovangeshe|vovangeshe]] || [[word:vovangeke|vovangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovangothotho|vovangothotho]] || [[word:vovangojojo|vovangojojo]] || [[word:vovangoshosho|vovangoshosho]] || [[word:vovangokoko|vovangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovangotho|vovangotho]] || [[word:vovangojo|vovangojo]] || [[word:vovangosho|vovangosho]] || [[word:vovangoko|vovangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovangofthof|vovangofthof]] || [[word:vovangofjof|vovangofjof]] || [[word:vovangofshof|vovangofshof]] || [[word:vovangofkof|vovangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfthĂŻf|vovangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfjĂŻf|vovangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfshĂŻf|vovangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfkĂŻf|vovangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vovangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vovangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vovangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vovangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfthĂŻf|vovangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfjĂŻf|vovangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfshĂŻf|vovangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfkĂŻf|vovangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfthĂŻf|vovangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfjĂŻf|vovangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfshĂŻf|vovangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovangĂŻfkĂŻf|vovangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovangĂŠthĂŠ|vovangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vovangĂŠjĂŠ|vovangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vovangĂŠshĂŠ|vovangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vovangĂŠkĂŠ|vovangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovangathatha|vovangathatha]] || [[word:vovangajaja|vovangajaja]] || [[word:vovangashasha|vovangashasha]] || [[word:vovangakaka|vovangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovangatha|vovangatha]] || [[word:vovangaja|vovangaja]] || [[word:vovangasha|vovangasha]] || [[word:vovangaka|vovangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovangafthaf|vovangafthaf]] || [[word:vovangafjaf|vovangafjaf]] || [[word:vovangafshaf|vovangafshaf]] || [[word:vovangafkaf|vovangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vovangasha|vovangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovangshĂ«asha|vovangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovangroasha|vovangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovangmuasha|vovangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovangyaasha|vovangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovangnkshĂ«asha|govovangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovangnkroasha|govovangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovangnkmuasha|govovangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovangnkyaasha|govovangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vovavangasha|vovavangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovavangshĂ«asha|vovavangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovavangroasha|vovavangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovavangmuasha|vovavangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovavangyaasha|vovavangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovavangnkshĂ«asha|govovavangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovavangnkroasha|govovavangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovavangnkmuasha|govovavangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovavangnkyaasha|govovavangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vevĂŠngasha|vevĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vevĂŠngshĂ«asha|vevĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vevĂŠngroasha|vevĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vevĂŠngmuasha|vevĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vevĂŠngyaasha|vevĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govevĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|govevĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govevĂŠngnkroasha|govevĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govevĂŠngnkmuasha|govevĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govevĂŠngnkyaasha|govevĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vovfangasha|vovfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovfangshĂ«asha|vovfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovfangroasha|vovfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovfangmuasha|vovfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovfangyaasha|vovfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovfangnkshĂ«asha|govovfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovfangnkroasha|govovfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovfangnkmuasha|govovfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovfangnkyaasha|govovfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
